key.name: model-path
key.summary: Path to the GGUF model file used for local transcription
key.description: Absolute path to a Whisper-compatible GGUF model. When empty, Kaki scans ~/.local/share/kaki/models/ for the first *.gguf at startup.

key.name: use-streaming
key.description: When true and the loaded model supports streaming, partial transcripts are emitted while speaking. When false, the whole clip is transcribed after stop.

key.name: language
key.description: ISO-639-1 language code passed to the transcribe runtime, or "auto" to let the model detect the language.

key.name: cpu-threads
key.summary: Number of CPU threads for the transcribe.cpp runtime
key.description: Thread count passed to SessionParams.n_threads. Ignored on GPU backends that don't use CPU threads.

key.name: dictation-auto-type
key.summary: Auto-type streamed text into focused window during dictation
key.description: When true, the streamed transcript is injected via the keystroke backend into whatever window has keyboard focus while Kaki is minimized. When false, dictation records and transcribes but does not inject keystrokes.

key.name: dictation-key-delay-ms
key.summary: Delay between keystrokes when simulating typing (ms)
key.description: Passed to ydotool (--key-delay) or xdotool (--delay). Ignored by the libei backend, which injects events directly.

key.name: dictation-trailing-newline
key.summary: Append a newline after each dictation session
key.description: When true, a newline is typed after the final transcript of each dictation session. Useful when dictating into a chat composer that sends on Enter.

key.name: keystroke-backend
key.description: Forces a specific backend. "auto" picks libei (if built with support) then ydotool then xdotool based on availability and session type.

key.name: gpu-backend
key.summary: Preferred GPU backend (read-only at runtime; reflects the build-time choice)
key.description: The resolved backend baked into the binary at build time (auto / hip / vulkan / cpu). Read-only at runtime; the binary was linked against one backend only.

key.name: flash-attention
key.summary: Enable flash-attention for the local Whisper model
key.description: When true, transcribe.cpp session.run is invoked with flash attention enabled. May improve performance on supported models.

key.name: transcription-source
key.description: "local" uses the GGUF model on disk. "api" sends audio to an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (see api-* keys).

key.name: api-endpoint
key.description: POSTed multipart/form-data with the captured WAV. Defaults to OpenAI; point at any OpenAI-compatible server.

key.name: api-model
key.summary: Model name sent to the transcription API
key.description: The "model" form field passed to the endpoint. Defaults to OpenAI's whisper-1.

key.name: api-response-format
key.summary: Response format requested from the transcription API
key.description: One of "json", "text", or "verbose_json". Sent as the "response_format" form field when supported by the endpoint.

key.name: api-temperature
key.summary: Sampling temperature for the transcription API (0.0–1.0)
key.description: Passed as the "temperature" form field. 0.0 is deterministic; 1.0 is maximum randomness.

key.name: api-translate
key.summary: Request English translation from the API
key.description: When true, sends "translate=true" so the API returns an English transcript of whatever language was spoken.

key.name: shortcut-record
key.description: GTK accelerator string. Applied at startup and re-applied live when changed in Preferences.

key.name: shortcut-stop
key.description: GTK accelerator string. Applied at startup and re-applied live when changed in Preferences.

key.name: shortcut-insert
key.description: GTK accelerator string. win.insert copies the transcript to the clipboard and types it into the previously focused window via the keystroke backend.

key.name: shortcut-dictate
key.description: GTK accelerator string. Toggles dictation mode on or off.

key.name: shortcut-prefs
key.description: GTK accelerator string. Opens the Preferences dialog.

key.name: shortcut-shortcuts
key.description: GTK accelerator string. Opens the Keyboard Shortcuts dialog.

key.name: shortcut-quit
key.description: GTK accelerator string. Quits Kaki.
